According to the department head, _______ are ready to begin work on the Arborney Bridge project.
The policy prohibiting visitor access to the laboratory must be ------- followed.
Yoon-Hee Kim is the _______ graduate of Serrica University to lead a Fortune 500 company.
Contact Frank Marilli in the IT department _______ you have any problems with the new database software.
A _______ efficiency expert will be visiting our work site in early November.
At Gallant's Pet Store, customer _______ are accepted between 9:00 A.M. and 6:00 P.M.
The management at Carette Industries _______ values the work of the research team.
Pentrexa Pharmacy is able to _______ most prescriptions within one business day.
The _______ of a parking structure for Huron General Hospital will begin on June 1.
Some of the flower beds surrounding Dale Valley Lodge had to be replanted _______ the recent rainstorm.
Several water stations _______ along the route of next week's marathon.
The Crown Lagoon Hotel has 150 rooms, each with a _______ view of the city.

We strongly advise you to back up the data stored on your electronic device _______ turning it in for repairs.

Mr. Pereira has worked in our legal department --- his transfer to the Atlanta office ten years ago.

For a list of local farms that supply food to restaurants, please _______ to the Hueland Farm Association Web site.

Annika Dulin ------- the marketing department at Tollason Industries' planning meeting tomorrow.
Do not post any statements about the company on social media without prior -------.
